bug_report.summary: Rendered H1 marker/prefix in “Helpful Links” preview shows a small visual difference (possible clipping/misalignment)
steps_to_reproduce: Open the “Helpful Links” document in preview mode.
Look at the H1 line rendering near the green “#” marker (left of the “Helpful Links” title).
expected_behaviors: The H1 marker/prefix area should render identically to before (no clipping/shift/extra artifact).
actual_behaviors: A thin vertical region within/near the green “#” marker area renders differently compared to before, suggesting a minor rendering/positioning artifact.

bug_report.summary: Preferences search field UI control/icon appears to render differently (possible misalignment/changed clear icon)
steps_to_reproduce: Observe the search box at the top of the Preferences left navigation panel.
expected_behaviors: The search field (including its icons such as clear/close) should render identically to before; no icon should shift, disappear, or change styling as a side effect of trimming H1 whitespace.
actual_behaviors: A small but visible difference is present in the search box icon/control area compared to before (icon rendering/position differs).
